Stanford Villa.walk_time_basis: Estimated from walking distance at 20 min/mile
Stanford Villa.washer_notes: No in-unit laundry; official site lists on-site laundry facilities (card-operated), and Apartments.com says on-site laundry is shared resident use.
Stanford Villa.evidence_summary: Official sources confirm on-site shared laundry rather than in-unit laundry. California Ave is the closest Caltrain stop; LoopNet showed 1.5 mi and Apartments.com showed 1.8 mi, so 1.5 mi was used.

Montage Apartments.walk_time_basis: Listed walking time/distance from third-party map result
Montage Apartments.washer_notes: Official site says in-home washer/dryers and washer/dryer in every home; Apartments.com also lists Washer/Dryer.
Montage Apartments.evidence_summary: Official site and Apartments.com both confirm in-unit washer/dryer. California Ave is the nearest Caltrain stop; LoopNet listed it at 0.8 mi / 15 min walk.

Southwood Apartments.walk_time_basis: Estimated from walking distance at 20 min/mile using map/search distance
Southwood Apartments.washer_notes: Official site says homes feature in-home washers and dryers, and Apartments.com also lists Washer/Dryer in apartment features.
Southwood Apartments.evidence_summary: Official site confirms in-home washer/dryer. Listing sites did not provide a walk route, so the California Ave walk time was estimated from map/search distance.

345 Sheridan Ave Unit SI FL3-ID806.washer_notes: Apartments.com says the apartment offers in-apartment laundry and lists Washer/Dryer in features.
345 Sheridan Ave Unit SI FL3-ID806.evidence_summary: Apartments.com lists California Avenue Caltrain at 0.4 mi / 8 min walk and states the apartment has in-apartment laundry with washer/dryer.

Sevens.walk_time_basis: Official site lists a 15-minute walk; distance back-calculated at 20 min/mile
Sevens.washer_notes: Official amenities page lists In-Unit Washer and Dryer; Apartments.com and Zillow also list in-unit washer/dryer.
Sevens.evidence_summary: Official site states Mountain View Caltrain Station is a 15-minute walk from Sevens and lists in-unit washer/dryer.

Rowe at Pear Village.walk_time_basis: Estimated from the listed 1.13 mi distance at 20 min/mile
Rowe at Pear Village.washer_notes: Official site says Whirlpool front-load washer and dryer in unit; Apartments.com and Zillow also list in-unit laundry.
Rowe at Pear Village.evidence_summary: Official amenities page lists in-unit washer/dryer. ApartmentHomeLiving lists Mountain View Caltrain at 1.13 mi; no direct walking route was exposed, so time was estimated.

Landsby.washer_notes: Apartments.com says Landsby has in-unit washers/dryers; official amenities page lists a GE front-load washer & dryer in select homes.
Landsby.evidence_summary: Official site says Landsby is a short walk to San Antonio Caltrain; Apartments.com lists San Antonio at 0.2 mi / 4 min walk and confirms in-unit laundry.

Verve.walk_time_basis: Estimated from listed distance at 20 min/mile because no explicit walking time was published
Verve.washer_notes: Official UDR amenities page says in-home washer/dryer; Apartments.com and ApartmentHomeLiving also list in-unit Washer/Dryer.
Verve.evidence_summary: Official UDR pages say Verve has an in-home washer/dryer. ApartmentHomeLiving lists San Antonio Caltrain as the closest stop at 0.66 mi.

The Shadows Apartments.walk_time_basis: Reported walking time from property transit listing
The Shadows Apartments.washer_notes: Official site and Apartments.com both list in-unit washer/dryer; Apartments.com also lists shared laundry facilities in the community.
The Shadows Apartments.evidence_summary: Official site and Apartments.com identify The Shadows at 750 N Shoreline Blvd and both list in-unit washer/dryer. LoopNet shows Mountain View Caltrain at 1.0 mi / 18 min walk.
The Shadows Apartments.corrected_address: 750 N Shoreline Blvd, Mountain View, CA 94043

MV Apartments.washer_notes: Official site lists in-home laundry appliances and a full-size front-loading washer and dryer; Apartments.com also lists in-unit washers and dryers.
MV Apartments.evidence_summary: Official MV Apartments site advertises in-home laundry appliances/full-size front-loading washer and dryer. Apartments.com lists San Antonio at 0.9 mi / 16 min walk.

Maplewood Apartments.walk_time_basis: Estimated from the listed 1.3 mi distance at 20 min/mile; no published walking route was found
Maplewood Apartments.washer_notes: Official site lists In-Home Washer & Dryer; Apartments.com also says units have in-unit washers and dryers.
Maplewood Apartments.evidence_summary: Official Maplewood site shows 1885 California St and in-home washer/dryer. Apartments.com lists Mountain View Caltrain at 1.3 mi and San Antonio at 1.5 mi.

Hartwood.washer_notes: Apartments.com lists Washer/Dryer in apartment features and says Hartwood has units with in-unit washers and dryers; the official site does not mention laundry.
Hartwood.evidence_summary: Hartwood’s official site says it is steps from Lawrence Station. Apartments.com lists Lawrence Caltrain at 0.1 mi / 1 min walk and confirms in-unit washer/dryer.

Savoy.washer_notes: Apartments.com lists Washer/Dryer under apartment features. The official site does not explicitly mention laundry, but nothing suggests shared-only laundry.
Savoy.evidence_summary: Official site says Savoy is made accessible by Lawrence Station Caltrain and lists the property at 1120 Kifer Road. Apartments.com lists Lawrence at 0.6 mi / 12 min walk and shows washer/dryer in apartment features.

Encasa.walk_time_basis: Estimated from listed walking distance at 20 min/mile
Encasa.washer_notes: Official site lists In Unit Washer & Dryer - Stackable; Apartments.com also lists in-unit washer/dryer.
Encasa.evidence_summary: Encasa’s official site lists an in-unit stackable washer/dryer. Apartments.com shows Lawrence as the closest Caltrain stop at 3.0 mi, so the walk time was estimated.

Naya.walk_time_basis: Estimated from Walk Score rail-line distance at 20 min/mile; no explicit walking time was found on listing sites
Naya.washer_notes: Greystar’s official page lists Washer/Dryer and Full Size Washer/Dryer, but Apartments.com FAQ contradicts that with a no in-unit/shared-laundry statement. Official site indicates in-unit laundry; third-party listing is inconsistent.
Naya.evidence_summary: Official Naya listing places the property at 1095 W El Camino Real and shows washer/dryer. Walk Score for that address shows rail lines 1.2 mi away, which was used as the best walk-distance proxy.
Naya.corrected_address: 1095 W El Camino Real, Sunnyvale, CA 94087

Redwood Place Apartment Homes.walk_time_basis: Direct walking result from Moovit for the same address, not an estimate
Redwood Place Apartment Homes.washer_notes: Official site lists in-home washer & dryer; Apartments.com also lists Washer/Dryer.
Redwood Place Apartment Homes.evidence_summary: Official Irvine Company pages confirm the address and in-home washer/dryer. Moovit lists Lawrence as the nearest train station at about 1.33 mi / 28 min walk.

The Meadows Apartments.walk_time_basis: Estimated at 20 min/mile from the best available distance; no source exposed an explicit walking route
The Meadows Apartments.washer_notes: Official amenities page lists Washer & Dryer Included; Apartments.com also shows in-unit washer/dryer.
The Meadows Apartments.evidence_summary: Official site says the property is a short walk to Caltrain and explicitly lists Washer & Dryer Included. Because no walking route was exposed on listing pages, the walk time is estimated.

Heritage Park.walk_time_basis: Listed walking time/distance from Apartments.com commuter rail listing
Heritage Park.washer_notes: Official amenities list Laundry Facilities as a community amenity, and Apartments.com FAQ says Heritage Park does not provide in-unit laundry and has on-site laundry facilities for shared resident use.
Heritage Park.evidence_summary: Official site confirms proximity to Sunnyvale Caltrain and lists community laundry facilities. Apartments.com specifies a 13-minute, 0.7-mile walk and states there is no in-unit laundry.
